calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-12-2015 Off Calendar

Motion And Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar May-07-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Robert Cohen, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, AUDIO GENERAL INCORPORATED.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) SNIBBE INTERACTIVE, INC.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Declaration of Rudy Gaba, Jr. on file.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $35,876.84
Pre-Judgment Interest: $16,434.01
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $499.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $52,809.85
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-17-2015 Continued To Jul-01-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
